response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with a long track record, but the profile is a poor match for this embedded security role. The required native-level Japanese proficiency is not present (languages listed are English, Romanian, German-basic), and that alone is disqualifying for this position. C/UNIX depth is thin and dated (LabWindows/CVI in 2014-2015, a C++ thesis), with most recent work in TypeScript/Node/DLang. There is no evidence of the core domain expertise — Linux kernel modification, LAN-switch firmware, MACsec/802.1X, switch chips, or embedded networking security.
strengths: 10+ years of broad software experience across web, embedded, and systems
Some C/C++ exposure (National Instruments LabWindows/CVI) and Linux familiarity
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, low-latency/high-throughput systems
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency, a hard requirement for the role
Limited and dated C-for-UNIX experience; recent stack is JS/TS/DLang
No embedded networking security domain (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chips, kernel mods)
